5c1d0f6c.description: Eng agent — assigned epic, story, or PR feedback?

checks.name: assigned-in-development
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --assignee @me --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --assignee @me --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: changes-requested-on-my-prs
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --assignee @me --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --assignee @me --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))
